description: A candid color event photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) of a Juneteenth flag-raising ceremony, apparently at a DHS facility outdoors. A row of several people in business attire stand on a red-brick walkway in a landscaped garden with green shrubs, lavender, and trees behind them. A man in a dark suit (appears to be Secretary Mayorkas) stands at a microphone on a tripod stand addressing the group. To the right fly two flags on a pole: a rainbow Progress Pride flag and a red Juneteenth flag. White folding chairs are visible at left, with an audience member's hand raised in the foreground. This is a documentary news/event photo.
